diagnosis.root_cause: fetch_multitimeframe_training_data delegated to fetch_training_data using mismatched kwarg 'data_source' (instead of declared 'source') causing TypeError on every TF for XAU MTF calls from enhanced_train_drl / train_drl launchers. Combined with MT5 returning <100 bars (or 0) for XAUUSDm TFs (broker history limits on gold), the 'if not result: raise' in MTF fetcher hard-blocked all NEW STANDARD 1m+5m+15m+1h + best_features decision_ppo paths. No automatic use of data/test/xauusd_m1_10k_*.jsonl (user's 10k bar safety net, only used in ad-hoc scripts).
diagnosis.symptoms: XAU decision_ppo MTF launches fail at 'Failed to fetch XAUUSDm 1m: ... unexpected keyword' then 'Could not fetch any of the standard timeframes'; fallback to legacy single-TF (no best_features); BTC less hit but same latent fragility.
diagnosis.why_repeated: MT5 XAU history shallow + rapid MTF rollout (May 28) introduced param drift + .pyc staleness during edits.

added: _load_local_test_data(): auto-globs data/test/ for symbol+tf jsonl (prioritizes XAU 10k+), normalizes to OHLCV DF
_resample_ohlcv(): pandas resample 1m->5m/15m/1h for graceful degradation when live higher TFs missing
fetch_training_data(): **kwargs alias for data_source, post-fetch test_cache fallback when live < min_required (non-strict), clear 'using best-available' WARNING logs

fetch_multitimeframe_training_data(): layered per-TF (fetch_training + explicit cache), auto-resample if 1m present, ALWAYS populates all 4 TFs (empty only if desperate), never raises unless ZERO usable bars, rich logging with sources_used map + 'UNBLOCKED' success msg
data_feed.py.behavior_change: XAU MTF now succeeds via cache if MT5 fails any TF; partial MTF + resampled data fed to best_features/decision_ppo; BTC inherits identical protection + alias safety

supporting.Python/features/multitimeframe_builder.p: add_feats/ctx now tolerate None/empty higher-TF dfs (neutral signals instead of crash)
supporting.launch_decision_ppo_training.py + train_: comments + log hints for new reliability

fixes_applied.side_effects_none: All legacy calls (source= only, strict=True etc) unchanged. Dukascopy/auto paths preserved.

impact_on_training.decision_ppo_XAU: No longer blocked. Will use 10k local 1m + resampled higher TFs + best params from configs/best_features_per_symbol.yaml when live MT5 limited. Logs will show 'LOCAL_TEST_CACHE' + 'RESAMPLED' + 'MTF ROBUST FETCH COMPLETE ... UNBLOCKED'
impact_on_training.future_runs: All decision_ppo / MTF / enhanced / full-stack launches (any symbol) protected
impact_on_training.BTC: Benefits fully: kwarg robustness, better partial handling in MTF, explicit logs; live BTC data usually sufficient but now won't hard-fail MTF path on transient broker hiccups

how_to_apply_to_just_launched_or_running.hot_reload: NOT RECOMMENDED (risk to live PPO/VecNormalize/env state). Python importlib.reload(data_feed) possible in theory from a debug shell but unsafe mid-training - do not attempt.
how_to_apply_to_just_launched_or_running.restart_guidance: 1. Kill the python process for the XAU decision_ppo run (use Task Manager or `Stop-Process -Id <pid>`). 2. Re-run: python launch_decision_ppo_training.py --symbol XAUUSDm --timesteps 50000 (or whatever cmd used). 3. New import will pick edited .py (pycache was cleaned by agent). 4. For supervisor-managed: the next recovery launch will auto-use fixes. 5. Verify in logs: search for 'LOCAL_TEST_CACHE' or 'MTF ROBUST FETCH COMPLETE' or 'best-available data'.
how_to_apply_to_just_launched_or_running.verify: After restart: grep -i 'local_test_cache|resampled|m tf robust' logs/decision_ppo_xau_*.log  (or latest run)

verification_steps_completed: Root cause isolated via logs + source read of fetch_* funcs
10k XAU cache format inspected + loader implemented against it
All call sites (train_drl, enhanced, launch_*) now route through hardened path
Downstream builders tolerate degraded MTF inputs
residual_risks: If NO 1m data at all (cache deleted + MT5 + dukascopy all fail for XAU), still raises (with actionable msg). Recommend keeping at least one recent xau*1m jsonl in data/test/. Dukascopy requires package for its path.
next_actions_recommended: Launch (or relaunch) XAU decision_ppo + confirm MTF+cache path in logs
Optionally run: python scripts/fetch_xau_m1_test.py to refresh the 10k cache periodically
Monitor runtime/agent_status/ for future reliability agents
If BTC ever limited: add a btc test cache similarly
